title: Applicability
doc_html:
§1026.2. Applicability

            This Part shall apply only to licensed long-term care facilities as defined in R.S. 37:1026.3.

            Acts 2007, No. 293, §1, eff. July 9, 2007; Acts 2022, No. 112, §1.
doc_text:
§1026.2.  Applicability
This Part shall apply only to licensed long-term care facilities as defined in R.S.
37:1026.3.
Acts 2007, No. 293, §1, eff. July 9, 2007; Acts 2022, No. 112, §1.
